scripts.vscode:prepublish: rimraf dist && rimraf --glob *-server/config_*/org.eclipse.* && npm run build:productionUpdate
scripts.build: npm run build:resources && webpack --mode development && npm run checkDeps
scripts.build:nlsUpdate: npm run build:nlsExtract && npm run build:nlsPseudo && npm run build:nlsFormat
scripts.build:nls: npm run build:nlsUpdate && npm run build
scripts.build:productionUpdate: npm run build:resources && npm run build:nlsUpdate && webpack --mode production && npm run checkDeps
scripts.package: vsce --version && vsce package --allow-star-activation --no-dependencies && node ../../scripts/mv-pack.js zopeneditor vsix

semanticTokenTypes.description: Z Open Editor Preprocessor Macro Line

view/item/context.when: (view == zowe.uss.explorer || view == zowe.ds.explorer || view == zowe.jobs.explorer) && viewItem =~ /^.*type=rse/ && zopeneditor.isRemoteConnectionEmulatorUnlocked && config.zopeneditor.advancedCapabilities.enableRceLaunchExternal

(view == zowe.uss.explorer || view == zowe.ds.explorer || view == zowe.jobs.explorer) && viewItem =~ /^.*type=rse/ && zopeneditor.isRemoteConnectionEmulatorUnlocked && config.zopeneditor.advancedCapabilities.enableRceLaunchWebview

editor/context.when: !zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && config.zopeneditor.userbuild.enabled && (resourceLangId == cobol || resourceLangId == pl1 || resourceLangId == hlasm || config.zopeneditor.userbuild.alwaysShowCommands) && (resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions || resourceLangId == hlasm || resourceLangId == jcl || resourceLangId == rexx)

!zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && config.zopeneditor.userbuild.enabled && (resourceLangId == cobol || resourceLangId == pl1 || resourceLangId == hlasm || config.zopeneditor.userbuild.alwaysShowCommands) && (resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions || resourceLangId == hlasm || resourceLangId == jcl || resourceLangId == rexx)

!zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && (((resourceLangId == cobol && cobolLSReady) || (resourceLangId == pl1 && pl1LSReady) && resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions) || resourceScheme =~ /^zowe/)

commandPalette.when: !zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && config.zopeneditor.userbuild.enabled && (resourceLangId == cobol || resourceLangId == pl1 || resourceLangId == hlasm || config.zopeneditor.userbuild.alwaysShowCommands) && (resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions || resourceLangId == hlasm)

!zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && config.zopeneditor.userbuild.enabled && (resourceLangId == cobol || resourceLangId == pl1 || resourceLangId == hlasm || config.zopeneditor.userbuild.alwaysShowCommands) && (resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions || resourceLangId == hlasm)

!zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && ((resourceLangId == cobol && cobolLSReady) || (resourceLangId == pl1 && pl1LSReady)) && resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions && zopeneditor.isDataElementsTableUnlocked

!zopeneditor.isVSCodeWeb && (((resourceLangId == cobol && cobolLSReady) || (resourceLangId == pl1 && pl1LSReady)) && resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions) && zopeneditor.isControlFlowGraphUnlocked

zopeneditor.show.in.actions.when: editorFocus && ((resourceLangId == cobol && cobolLSReady) || (resourceLangId == pl1 && pl1LSReady)) && resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions && zopeneditor.isDataElementsTableUnlocked

editorFocus && ((resourceLangId == cobol && cobolLSReady) || (resourceLangId == pl1 && pl1LSReady)) && resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions && zopeneditor.isControlFlowGraphUnlocked
editorFocus && (resourceLangId == cobol && cobolLSReady) && resourceExtname not in zopeneditor.includeFileExtensions && zopeneditor.isDataFlowGraphUnlocked
